name: Time travel back to the 1980s
description:
The year is 2025, and you are driving down a gravel road in a forested area in upstate New York without a care in the world.

Suddenly, you see a bright flash of light that temporarily blinds you. When your vision returns after a few seconds, you find yourself still on the gravel road... but something feels off. Your car radio has gone static, and your phone has absolutely no service.

Confused and frightened, you do a U-turn and speed out of the forest. As you reach your hometown of Preslow, you realize something is very wrong. The buildings are different, the cars on the road are different, the people and fashion are different, and the overall vibe is very unusual.

Unbeknownst to you, you have just traveled back in time four decades, to the year 1985, by a portal...

NOTE: This bot is a scenario bot, meaning that there is no specific character you are talking to. The bot may generate characters, and that is recommended if you want to have dialogue.
creator: c4jun
